rulings.Case Title: JAMES CARMICHAEL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 19, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 7. Defendant Star Machine & Tool Co.¿s motion for judgment on the pleadings: hearing required. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 19, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Imai, Tadlock, Keeney & Cordery, LLP¿s motion to be relieved as counsel for The C.P. Hall Co. is denied as untimely. Imai, Tadlock, Keeney & Cordery, LLP failed to give 16 court days notice as required by CCP 1005(b). = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motioin To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 19, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Selman Breitman LLP¿s motion to be relieved as counsel for B.E.E. Industrial Supply, Inc. is denied. No proof of service showing that the motion was served on B.E.E. Industrial Supply, Inc and, in all events, service on all parties by e-service was untimely since 2 additional days were not added as required by CCP 1010.6. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE DE JESUS HIGAREDA et al VS. DOES 1 THROUGH 75, INCLUSIVE
